contract_notes: Use the existing Social Security taxation contract: each filing-status variant stores base_amount, upper_amount, max_taxable_pct_below_upper, and max_taxable_pct_above_upper.

For married_filing_separately, the contract is split by lived_with_spouse_during_year. false uses the single/head_of_household/qualifying_surviving_spouse thresholds, while true uses the special 0/0 thresholds with immediate 85% treatment.
Do not mark a schema change solely because the thresholds are statutory and unchanged; the pipeline should still verify the current published IRS guidance against the embedded values.
